element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary enemy defeat and obstacle traversal method
Strategic enemy elimination without direct contact
Discrimination between beneficial and harmful items

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate difficulty platformer with breathing room; not punishingly hard. Mean Machines noted difficulty as 'too easy for hardened platform veterans' suggesting accessible pacing with gentle challenge curves

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible introduction to core mechanics (jump, spin, eat); designed for broad audience appeal
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive introduction of power-ups and hazardous elements; moderation of challenge prevents frustration

notable_level_patterns.description: Overarching progression structure: player advances across Tasmania toward Lost Valley to find giant seabird eggs. Narrative motivation for level sequencing through environmental progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All levels progress toward Lost Valley destination

notable_level_patterns.description: Spin attack serves dual purpose as combat tool and platforming enabler (increased jump distance, obstacle bypass). Level design likely gates progression on mastery of this core mechanic.

sources_used: tcrf - Taz-Mania (SNES) The Cutting Room Floor
